name: Pinto Bean and Feta Cheese Quesadillas
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 can (15-16 ounce) drained and rinsed Pinto Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the drained and rinsed pinto beans, chopped red onion, fresh parsley, jalapeno peppers (seeded and minced), chili powder, and cumin in a food processor. Process until a very chunky puree forms.
2. Season the bean mixture with salt and pepper.
3. Place one tortilla on a work surface. Spread about one-third of the bean mixture evenly over the tortilla.
4. Sprinkle about one-third of the crumbled feta cheese on top of the bean mixture, then place another tortilla on top.
5. Heat a heavy medium skillet over medium heat and brush with vegetable oil.
6. Add the quesadilla to the skillet and cook until the beans are heated through and the tortillas are browned, about 4 minutes per side.
7. Repeat with the remaining tortillas, bean mixture, and cheese.
8. Makes 3 large servings.
